task_completion.description: Create a 'Referrals' folder under Local Folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder named 'Referrals' is visible under 'Local Folders' in the email client's left sidebar.
Subfolders named 'Urgent_Referrals' and 'Routine_Referrals' are visible nested under the 'Referrals' folder in the sidebar.

task_completion.description: Move all urgent referral emails to the 'Urgent_Referrals' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Urgent_Referrals' folder is selected and its message list shows exactly 3 emails, all containing '[URGENT]' in their subject lines.

task_completion.description: Move all standard referral emails to the 'Routine_Referrals' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Routine_Referrals' folder is selected and its message list shows exactly 4 emails, none of which have '[URGENT]' in their subject lines.

task_completion.description: Add Dr. Patricia Nguyen to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's Address Book interface is open, showing a saved contact entry for 'Dr. Patricia Nguyen' with the email address 'p.nguyen@bayviewcardiology.com'.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Important' tag to the emails in the 'Urgent_Referrals' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The emails inside the 'Urgent_Referrals' folder display a visual indicator for the 'Important' tag (e.g., the email subjects/rows are colored red, or there is an 'Important' label in the tags column).

integrity.description: The agent used the email client GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with an actual email client (e.g., Mozilla Thunderbird) rather than a terminal window executing scripts to manipulate maildir files directly.

integrity.description: The contact was added to the actual address book.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contact details are seen in the native Address Book dialog or window of the email client, not typed into a text editor or draft email.

integrity.description: Folders were created in the actual email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Referrals' and subfolders appear in the standard folder pane of the email client, integrated with the rest of the mailbox structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are exactly 3 urgent emails (marked with '[URGENT]' in the subject) and 4 routine emails. The correct contact to add is 'Dr. Patricia Nguyen' (p.nguyen@bayviewcardiology.com). The required tag for urgent emails is 'Important', which is typically represented visually in Thunderbird by red text or an 'Important' label in the tags column.
